name: parse
description: Parse raw CSV files into typed parquet files partitioned by domain and day
input_format: Raw CSV files (key:value, no header). Example row: `2026-01-20T09:07:58Z;m0:10;m1:12;outdoor_temp:18.94`
output_format: Parquet files per domain and day: `<source>__<domain>__<YYYY-MM-DD>.parquet`

format.description: Input file format (kv_csv: semicolon-separated key:value pairs)

delimiter.description: Field delimiter between key:value pairs in each row

tz.description: Timezone of timestamps in raw files (IANA format, e.g. Europe/Paris)

timestamp_column.description: Name of the timestamp column in parsed output

domains.description: Domain definitions: map domain name to column selection (prefix or explicit list) and dtype

file_name_substitute.description: List of [pattern, replacement] pairs to normalize source filenames before parsing
